Bd3 f5 |eco=[[Chess/ECOB|B00]] |parent=[[Chess/King's Pawn Opening|King's Pawn Opening]] }} = Matovinsky Gambit = ===3...f5 === Offering white the f-pawn, in exchange for exposing white's unprotected g-pawn and cornered rook. White can now play: *4. exf5, accepting the gambit and exposing white's unprotected g-pawn and cornered rook *Or, white may decline the gambit by not playing 4. exf5 ==Theory table== {{ChessTable}} '''1.e4 b6 2. d4 Bb7 3. Bd3 f5'''
4 5 6 7 8
[[/4. exf5|exf5]]
Bxg2		 Qh5+
g6		 fxg6
Nf6		 gxh7+
Nxh5		 Bg6#
